creators.name: Nick Saraev
creators.blurb: Practical AI automation and agency builds from someone shipping real systems.

videos.title: I Built a $1M/y SaaS with Claude Code, Here's How
videos.summary: Nick Saraev describes how he built Clairvo, a $1M/year SaaS that improves call pickup rates using Claude Code-generated techniques like algorithmic predictive pacing. He demonstrates a framework for leveraging Claude to enumerate market opportunities and argues that human-centric moats win over pure model capability.

videos.title: How to Build Mobile Apps with Claude Code: Full Course (2026)
videos.summary: Nick Saraev's full-length course teaches mobile app development using Claude Code, covering iOS and Android app creation with Expo and React Native. The course includes building three sample apps (habit tracker, calorie tracker with AI, Pomodoro), Supabase database integration, user authentication, and app store submission processes.

videos.title: How to Use Claude Code for FREE (2026)
videos.summary: Nick Saraev demonstrates how to use Claude Code for free or low cost by integrating it with alternative backend services including NVIDIA-NIM, OpenRouter, Ollama, and DeepSeek V4 Flash. The tutorial covers setup procedures for each integration method across a multi-hour video course.

videos.title: Claude Opus-4.7 Just Dropped, And...
videos.summary: Nick Saraev announces the release of Claude Opus-4.7. The video covers the new model's capabilities, with emphasis on practical applications for automation and business workflows.
